ul.li: Error Codes: Pushed for specific exceptions (Segment/Page faults).
Page Fault (0x0E): Crucial exception; CR2 register stores the linear address that caused the fault.

g.title: Reported before the instruction that caused the exception. Saved EIP points to faulting instruction.
Reported following the instruction that caused the exception. Saved EIP points to next instruction.
Severe unrecoverable error. Machine context may be lost.
External asynchronous event or software-triggered interrupt.
Reported before the instruction that caused the exception. Saved EIP points to faulting instruction.
Reported following the instruction that caused the exception. Saved EIP points to next instruction.
Severe unrecoverable error. Machine context may be lost.
External asynchronous event or software-triggered interrupt.
